prompt: 2026 CURRENT pricing + offering for security QUESTIONNAIRE AUTOMATION + TRUST CENTER tools: CONVEYOR, SAFEBASE, SKYPHER (and Vanta Questionnaire Automation). For each (cite URLs/dates): (a) pricing if public or typical range + model, (b) what you GET (AI questionnaire auto-answer, trust center / doc portal, self-serve buyer access), (c) do they produce a SIGNED, independently VERIFIABLE security artifact about the vendor's AI, or do they just draft answers / share existing docs (SOC 2 PDF)? (d) do they actually run a security AUDIT of the AI, or just manage/share evidence? Be precise + cite.
content:
**Conveyor (conveyor.com; pricing page and comparisons as of early-mid 2026 data):**[[1]](https://www.conveyor.com/pricing)[[2]](https://trustmind.com/blog/complete-guide-security-questionnaire-automation-2026/)

**(a) Pricing:** Free tier (limited credits/documents). Professional plan starts at **$9,600/year** (20 questionnaire credits at 100 questions each + 100 Trust Center credits; unlimited seats on paid plans). Enterprise/custom (typically $15k–$35k/year range for mid-market; volume/credit-based and negotiable). Credit-based model tied to questionnaires processed and Trust Center accesses.[[1]](https://www.conveyor.com/pricing)[[3]](https://www.orbiqhq.com/compliance-automation/security-questionnaire-software)

**(b) Offerings:** Generative AI for instant security questionnaire auto-answers (95%+ accuracy claimed, low hallucination); Trust Center/doc portal for proactive sharing; self-serve buyer access (gated content, NDAs, watermarking, custom domains). Browser extension support for portals. Focus on security reviews + some RFP.[[4]](https://www.conveyor.com/platform/security-questionnaire-automation-software)

**(c) Signed/verifiable AI artifact:** No. It drafts AI-generated answers from your uploaded docs, knowledge base, Q&As, and external sources, then lets you review/approve/export. It also hosts/shares your existing security docs (e.g., SOC 2 PDFs). No production of a signed, independently verifiable security artifact specifically about Conveyor’s own AI.[[5]](https://skypher.co/post/best-security-questionnaire-automation-software)

**(d) AI security audit:** No. It manages and shares your evidence/docs and generates drafts from them; it does not run independent security audits of the AI itself.[[6]](https://www.complyjet.com/blog/best-security-questionnaire-automation)

**SafeBase (now part of Drata; drata.com/products/trust-center and related 2026 comparisons):**[[7]](https://www.orbiqhq.com/trust-center/best-trust-center-2026)

**(a) Pricing:** Opaque (“contact sales”); standalone Trust Center estimates ~$8,000–$15,000/year; often bundled with Drata GRC (median ~$25k ACV). Enterprise-oriented, sales-led.[[8]](https://www.cyberbase.ai/blog/what-is-a-trust-center-2026)[[9]](https://www.complyjet.com/blog/best-trust-center-software)

**(b) Offerings:** Branded Trust Center for document access/sharing (primary strength); AI-powered questionnaire assistance/auto-fill; self-serve buyer portal with engagement analytics, CRM (Salesforce) integration, and request gating. Questionnaire automation is a secondary feature.[[10]](https://www.vanta.com/resources/best-trust-center-software)

**(c) Signed/verifiable AI artifact:** No. It provides AI-assisted drafting of answers and hosts/shares existing compliance docs (SOC 2, etc.). No signed, independently verifiable artifact about SafeBase/Drata’s AI.[[5]](https://skypher.co/post/best-security-questionnaire-automation-software)

**(d) AI security audit:** No. It focuses on document sharing, access control, and assisted response drafting from your materials; no independent security audit of the AI.[[11]](https://osto.one/feeds/blog/ai-tools-auto-filling-vendor-security-questionnaire)

**Skypher (skypher.co; 2026 reviews and site):**[[5]](https://skypher.co/post/best-security-questionnaire-automation-software)

**(a) Pricing:** Quote-based/custom (not publicly disclosed; flexible for volume). Optimized for teams handling 20+ questionnaires/year.[[5]](https://skypher.co/post/best-security-questionnaire-automation-software)[[6]](https://www.complyjet.com/blog/best-security-questionnaire-automation)

**(b) Offerings:** Agentic AI questionnaire automation (claimed 96% accuracy with sentence-level source highlighting/traceability); custom Trust Center; self-serve buyer access. Supports many formats/portal connectors; unlimited users model; strong on grounded responses from multiple sources (SharePoint, Google Drive, wikis, etc.).[[12]](https://skypher.co/)

**(c) Signed/verifiable AI artifact:** No. It auto-generates answers with citations and traceability to your sources, plus Trust Center for sharing docs. It is itself SOC 2 Type II compliant. No signed, independently verifiable security artifact about Skypher’s AI.[[6]](https://www.complyjet.com/blog/best-security-questionnaire-automation)

**(d) AI security audit:** No. It automates drafting/management of responses and evidence sharing from your materials; does not perform independent security audits of the AI.[[11]](https://osto.one/feeds/blog/ai-tools-auto-filling-vendor-security-questionnaire)

**Vanta Questionnaire Automation (vanta.com; 2026 plans and comparisons):**[[13]](https://www.vanta.com/pricing)

**(a) Pricing:** Part of broader Vanta plans (Core starts ~$10k/year; median subscriber ~$19.8k). Questionnaire automation add-on or tiered limits (e.g., 25 questionnaires/year included in some plans; upgrade to 144/year). Trust Center add-on ~$6k+. Custom/quote-based overall; scales with frameworks, users, and add-ons.[[14]](https://wolfia.com/blog/vanta-reviews-pricing-alternatives)[[15]](https://www.secureleap.tech/blog/vanta-review-pricing-top-alternatives-for-compliance-automation)

**(b) Offerings:** AI-powered questionnaire automation (pulls from your existing compliance evidence/knowledge base; human routing/approval workflows added in 2026); integrated Trust Center for self-serve buyer access to real-time evidence/docs; strong for teams already using Vanta for SOC 2/ISO monitoring.[[16]](https://www.vanta.com/resources/best-security-questionnaire-automation-software)

**(c) Signed/verifiable AI artifact:** No. It generates “audit-ready” answers anchored to your live controls, policies, and evidence (SOC 2, etc.), plus Trust Center document sharing. No production of a signed, independently verifiable artifact specifically about Vanta’s AI.[[17]](https://techiehub.blog/best-ai-agents-security-questionnaires/)

**(d) AI security audit:** No. It manages/shares your compliance evidence and drafts responses from it; does not run independent security audits of the AI itself.[[11]](https://osto.one/feeds/blog/ai-tools-auto-filling-vendor-security-questionnaire)

**Overall notes (as of June 2026 data):** None of these tools produce a signed, independently verifiable security artifact (e.g., a cryptographically signed report or attestation) specifically about *their own AI’s security properties*. They focus on drafting answers from your materials, reusing prior responses, and/or sharing your existing compliance artifacts (SOC 2 PDFs, etc.). They also do not run independent security audits of the AI; they are evidence-management and automation platforms. All are themselves typically SOC 2 compliant. Pricing and exact feature depth can vary by negotiation/custom tiers; always verify directly with vendors for current quotes. Sources include official sites and 2026 comparative analyses.
